data.four_set_effect: Increases Elemental Burst DMG by 25% of Energy Recharge. A maximum of 75% bonus DMG can be obtained in this way.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A sturdy and hard helmet worn as armor by a noble samurai.
circlet_of_logos.title: Ornate Kabuto

flower_of_life.desc: Legends hold that this ornate hand guard was once fitted upon a sword gifted to the oni who betrayed the Shogun.
flower_of_life.title: Magnificent Tsuba

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: An intricately-designed wine vessel that a world-famous martial artist once drank from.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Scarlet Vessel

plume_of_death.desc: This was once the black feather of a certain tengu warrior, and was the treasured souvenir of an ancient swordsman.
plume_of_death.title: Sundered Feather

sands_of_eon.desc: An exquisite seal cage patterned with pansies painted upon a black backdrop, decorated with shining inlaid seashells and intricate gold-work.
sands_of_eon.title: Storm Cage

list.desc: Mother had bared her fangs against the Shogun, who had been kind to her and who had given her a treasured sword.</br>In the end, the only thing that was sent back to the Mikoshi Clan was the tsuba of that blade which she had loved so dearly.</br>Mother's long-cherished wish was to overcome the destiny of life and death with her boiling passion.</br>She would make such contributions as to make an eternal name for the ever-thinning blood of the war-oni.</br>If she was engulfed by the pitch-black tiger-beast of sin itself, then she would tear it apart from the inside.</br>She would've proven her valor resoundingly under the Electro Mitsudomoe banner,</br>And she thought she could wash her bloodstained juunihitoe battle-garb clean.</br>But it was stained black in the end, together with her fiercely beating heart...</br>From then on, her eldest son, who should have inherited the family fortune, lived in seclusion in a village outside the city,</br>With naught but the mountain and wood as his friends — that is, until he met that girl...</br>"What a pain. Well, if you wish to abandon your past, allow me to give you a new name."</br>After hearing about his past, the girl who possessed jet black wings sneered disdainfully.</br>"Well, you shall be called Iwakura. 'The seat of rock.' A name that human words cannot harm."</br>"Come on, mortal in whose veins runs the blood of the oni, be glad. Smile a little!"</br>"You should know that names given by us Yougou Tengu are blessed with divine powers."</br>"Besides, the name 'rock' suits you — it certainly suits your mind and your muscles, that's for sure."</br>"Well then, when the cherry blossoms fall next year, let's have a duel here, 'Iwakura.'"</br>"Child of the oni, hone your swordsmanship and become a foe whom the Yougou Tengu would not be ashamed to cross swords with."</br>"Ah, yes! If you manage to touch me, you'll get to call your secret blade 'Tengu Victor'!"</br>"After all, if you get to that point, you'll have a sword that'll let you 'triumph over the tengu.'"</br>
list.title: Magnificent Tsuba

list.desc: "I've been wondering, Sir Douin, could your sword actually slice through lightning?"</br>So said the young Kanjou Head, Hiroshi, while sheathing his blade. Douin replied thus, woodenly:</br>"How could that be possible? At most, I'd say that it could strike a Tengu in mid-air."</br>"That said, though, no one has ever brought a tengu down before. Not even once."</br>"Is that so? In that case, where does the name of your secret blade, 'Tengu Sweeper,' come from?"</br>Seeing that Douin did not answer, the Kanjou Head who had built Ritou up said:</br>"Ah, if it wasn't for old man Kujou making a move first, I would've loved to recruit you."</br>"With your sword, even Ako Domeki of Seirai would be no match..."</br>Cleaving through the storm clouds, that tengu had given him a new name and a new life.</br>She threw him the rusty blade and told him to strike her, a tengu, down.</br>And after his sword broke, these were her last words to him...</br>
list.title: Ornate Kabuto

list.desc: With his secret sword technique, Tengu Sweeper, Iwakura Doukei became the Kujou Clan's swordsmanship instructor.</br>He also received the title of "Douin" and founded a successful sword school.</br>As he headed off to take up his post at the Kujou Estate, Doukei, who had long learned how to drink,</br>Stepped into the branch shrine that had been utterly destroyed by his completion of the Tengu Sweeper.</br>Here, in the courtyard of this abandoned branch shrine, he had sparred with the Tengu of Yougou thirteen times in the last thirteen years.</br>He remembered his encounter with the black-winged tengu who had called herself "Teruyo of Yougou"...</br>Thirteen years went by like a dream</br>The scarlet snow flies through the shadowed pass like smoke</br>You have now gone afar</br>The Sacred Sakura petals fell then, too, as if they were snow from the sky.</br>The branch shrine had lost the god it worshipped, but it was still in a fine state.</br>Laughter as clear as spring water echoed between the mountains.</br>But never again would the two set foot in that desolate yard.</br>
list.title: Scarlet Vessel

list.desc: Surrounded by the black feathers seized by his onrushing blade, the man who stood on the cusp of becoming a swordmaster...</br>...Finally caught the girl who had been untouchable for so many years...</br>"Yikes, that was a close shave. Well done indeed."</br>"If your sword hadn't been broken by your strength,"</br>"I would've died here for sure. Well then..."</br>Teruyo, shall we change the venue for our duel next year?</br>There are a few places I know of where you can also see the scarlet sakura falling...</br>As he looked around at the small shrine he had destroyed, holding the tengu's trembling hand,</br>These words lay on the tip of Doukei's tongue even as he stared at the black feathers that he had sliced off.</br>"You did touch me, after all. I must admit that this is clearly your victory."</br>Victory has not been decided yet. Let's meet again next year, he wanted to say.</br>"Now, your sword can even surpass the speed of a tengu."</br>"I will never forget a single one of our duels in these past thirteen years."</br>"But as a Tengu, I have duties to the clan that I must fulfill."</br>"Thinking back, I changed your name in hopes that you might escape from the curse of the oni bloodline."</br>"With that war, non-human blood grows thinner and thinner."</br>"Ah well. We should not covet the happy endings that humans enjoy, after all. But you're different."</br>"You are now 'Iwakura.' You are no longer the 'Mikoshi' who shoulders the burden of oni blood."</br>"Goodbye, Doukei, and please forget me."</br>"Use your sword for the Iwakura bloodline... and open a path that belongs to the Iwakura alone."</br>
list.title: Sundered Feather

list.desc: In the distant past, when Seirai Island had yet to be shrouded by storm clouds, memories would rise and fall like breaths.</br>In the end, the elegant container that contained thunderstorms and tremors could not be handed over to the one to whom it was promised.</br>"Did you come to me because the string is broken again? You're such a headache."</br>"Other than your swordsmanship, you're just an idiotic old gambler, aren't you?"</br>"Hmph. Don't you look down on me. I learned my archery from a tengu, you know? It's pretty famous, too."</br>"It's just that I'm too good with a sword, you know? That's why no one ever talks about my archery."</br>"Actually, now that I think about it, that's such a waste of good archery. How about I teach it to you, then?"</br>Once upon a time, you mended that idiot's broken seal cage, all the while speaking those harsh words...</br>Once upon a time, though you used harsh words to divert others, you could not help but smile faintly.</br>"Please. You're already a Hatamoto with important responsibilities. Why are you still running around looking for trouble?"</br>"And you're already married too, to a sweet wife no less. Why do you spend your days wandering and gambling, huh?"</br>You're already...</br>The question was on the edge of your lips, but you were unable to ask, and you decided never to bring it up again.</br>If the Lady Saiguu had been here with you, she would surely have put it in a clever and merry way...</br>"It doesn't matter anymore. I gave myself a holiday, at least for today."</br>"Let's leave that whole shrine business behind and sneak off to the seaside, just like we did when you were little."</br>And so he dragged you to the harbor, where you watched the ships sailing back and forth, as if in a trance.</br>You listened to him talk about Teruyo of the shrine, and how she had inherited her master's beauty and skill.</br>You listened to him talk about his terrifying nightmares, in which he cut off his own head...</br>But you both knew that those were just words to hide the melancholy of adulthood.</br>Later, a long time later,</br>Overlooking the mossy reefs and the harbor where the two of you once had that quiet rendezvous...</br>For the gambler to win his bet again, for the sake of praying for his safety...</br>Once again, you dared to stand upon those heights, holding up the seal cage that you made with your own hands.</br>Bearing the hope of retrieving those memories, you gathered the power of thunder and lightning.</br>
list.title: Storm Cage
